encounter_goal: Break the Null Anomaly echo before its signature phase mechanic fully resolves, while suppressing support variants and maintaining encounter control.
trigger_rule: Trigger only when player level >= 20, player enters or completes a combat action inside Spire-Foot Transit Plaza, and the sublocation has not awarded its weekly unique-loot eligibility. Completion XP and spawned-enemy XP are both forcibly set to 0.
failure_state: Event fails if the local anomaly reaches 100% intensity, all eligible players are downed, or the primary variant completes its empowered phase three times. Failure gives no XP and no loot roll.
hazard_profile: high-speed transit sweeps, lane swaps, and lethal timing windows
variant_mechanic: Overcharged Echo Rule: the boss repeats one signature world mechanic at 70%, 40%, and 15% health, each time with a tighter counter window.
no_xp_policy: 0 completion XP; 0 spawned-enemy XP; combo-multiplier XP hooks disabled; event cannot be chained for leveling.
group_scaling: Solo-scaled, 2-player, 4-player, and 8-player public-event variants; HP scales by +65% per additional player after the first, damage scales by +8% per additional player, and loot eligibility requires active contribution.
first_clear_reward: Guaranteed first-clear: Spire-Foot Null Ring pattern token + Refined Relic crafting imprint.
repeat_drop_rule: Repeat clear: 20% chance for the unique ring; pity token after 8 eligible clears.
unique_perk: Unique Perk: while inside Urban-type arenas, gain a short defensive or traversal proc after countering Null Anomaly mechanics. Does not increase XP gain.
